# Popular Poet

[Popular Poet](https://www.popularpoet.pl/) is a performing arts theatre and workshop space in Warsaw, Poland. Tickets for public shows are sold on [PopularTickets](https://www.populartickets.pl/).

## Contact and location

- Address: ul. Domaniewska 37, Centrum biznesowe Zepter, piętro 5, lokal 42, 02-677 Warszawa, Poland
- [Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/BtaKyKYvp6nGZbx37)
- Phone: +48 452 203 802

## What we offer

- Acting classes in Warsaw (Russian- and Ukrainian-speaking groups)
- Improvisation workshops and courses
- Storytelling workshops
- [PLAY-BACK theatre](https://www.popularpoet.pl/pl/kursy/playback)
- Theatre masterclasses and open stage practice
- Trial / introductory classes
- Community events for Russian- and Ukrainian-speaking audiences in Warsaw

## Official profiles

- [Instagram — @popular_poet_theatre](https://www.instagram.com/popular_poet_theatre/)
- [YouTube — Popular Poet](https://www.youtube.com/@Popularpoet)
- [Telegram community](https://t.me/+yzYzcxC0lJ05NGQy)
